underlying_goal: Add MCTS-based action evaluation with win statistics to SwiftUI game views, share the component across all games, and fix various gameplay/UI issues
friction_detail: MCTS stats recomputed on tab switch, and scores displayed as identical integers due to truncation of small float differences.
brief_summary: User wanted MCTS action stats in SwiftUI game views shared across all games, plus log and deck fixes; Claude delivered iteratively with a couple display bugs caught by the user.
